name: cd-generator
notes: This version belongs only to the cd-generator skill.
Do not sync this version to the Sense Talk project package.json.
Do not use the Sense Talk project version as this skill version.
All generated task data must stay under /Users/zhanghua/.claude/skills/cd-generator/output.
The historical worktree copy of 20260429_235435_bakery_adventure has been moved out of the project path after migration.
shanyin-direct cd-generator mode is aligned to 16:9 left/center/right or diagonal storyboard JSON.
shanyin-write cd-generator mode is aligned to structured story outline and chapter script JSON inputs.
v2.10.0: Added Stage 2 - Story Arc and Character Cards generation between batch screening and detailed script.
v2.9.0: Added batch generation and scoring features for story outlines.
v2.11.0: Modularized image generation. chatgpt-image is the reusable single-image/OpenCLI service; cd-generator owns batching and calls that service for each image operation.
v2.12.0: Stage 2 now generates bilingual full character/entity visual cards plus exactly two scene tone prompts for world-style continuity.
v2.13.0: Visual reference images use fixed 16:9 2x4 sheets with 8 assets per sheet; all character/entity cards are cropped from sheets, and overflow splits into multiple sheets.

v2.14.0: Scene tone images are now defined as world visual bible images: concrete core locations, reusable motifs, material/color rules, and rough spatial anchors, not pure mood boards or precise maps.

v2.15.0: Image generation now builds prompts_with_refs before submission, appending per-page character/entity continuity text and scene visual bible text from character_cards.json; current OpenCLI mode remains text-only and stores .refs.json for future image-reference API integration.
